error.emhass_connection: Could not reach EMHASS at the given URL

data.optimizer_enabled: Let the optimizer control the battery

data_description.power_scan_enabled: Allows a higher update rate of the various power values of your device.
data_description.battery_modules: Number of battery modules to expose per-module serial sensors for (0 = auto-detect from the inverter).
data_description.time_of_use_slots: Number of battery charge/discharge time slots (1-9) to expose as editable start/end time, priority and enable entities (0 = none).
data_description.emhass_url: Base URL of your EMHASS instance, e.g. http://homeassistant.local:5000. Leave empty to disable the optimizer.
data_description.emhass_token: Bearer token, only if your EMHASS instance requires authentication.
data_description.optimizer_soc_sensor: Battery state-of-charge sensor fed back to EMHASS as the live starting SOC (used in later phases).
data_description.optimizer_interval: How often the published EMHASS plan is re-read.
data_description.optimizer_enabled: When on, the optimizer writes the EMHASS plan to the inverter's time-of-use slots and AC-charge control. Leave off to keep it read-only (diagnostics only).

set_time_slot.name: Set battery time slot
set_time_slot.description: Configure one of the 9 battery charge/discharge time slots on a Growatt storage/hybrid inverter.

run_optimization.name: Run EMHASS optimization
run_optimization.description: Trigger an EMHASS day-ahead optimisation and publish the result, then refresh the optimizer diagnostic sensors.
